title: Emberspark Cobblemon
description: This modpack is mainly meant to be used in conjunction with the Emberspark Cobblemon Server, but aims to provide a good QOL experience and steady performance when playing Cobblemon!
body:
A small modpack that aims to provide some quality of life features while keeping a steady amount of performance while playing Cobblemon. 

Adding some QOL mods like Natures Compass in order to be able to find the biome you want to look for Pokemon in, or even Sophisticated Backpacks in order to carry all the Pokeballs you could possibly need, this modpack tries to be as Cobblemon+ as possible, while keeping into its Minecraftian roots.
